expect: Fixed-point flips TRUE after genesis_extract.py added to BOOT_TOOLS. Daughter bundle includes copier. Predicted swarmability increases above 80/100 baseline. Falsified if swarmability stays at 80 or fixed-point remains FALSE.
actual: CONFIRMED. Fixed-point TRUE. Boot ratio 1.154→1.2456. Copier-in-description TRUE. Controller coverage 67%→100% (CLAUDE.md added). Daughter swarmability 80→100/100 (10/10 checks pass). Granddaughter extraction verified: parent→daughter→granddaughter chain holds. Granddaughter: 82 files, 661KB.
diff: Expected fixed-point flip: confirmed. Expected swarmability >80: got 100 (stronger than expected). Did NOT expect controller coverage to also improve (67%→100%) — CLAUDE.md was a second gap. Generational decay: infinite (capacity grows, not shrinks).
changes_made: genesis_extract.py: moved from GROWTH_TOOLS to OPERATIONAL_TOOLS (now in BOOT_TOOLS)
von_neumann_test.py: added genesis_extract.py and CLAUDE.md to BOOT_TIER_D
lesson: Two gaps, not one: the copier (genesis_extract.py) AND a controller entry file (CLAUDE.md) were both missing from the boot description. Von Neumann's dual-use theorem requires D to encode the entire reproduction pipeline, including the mechanism that reads D.
